metadata.description: Runs Playwright Tests in src/example.spec.ts in CI
Merges Playwright blob reports from atomized tasks to produce unified reports for the configured reporters.

options.command: pnpm exec nx watch --projects user-ui --includeDependentProjects -- pnpm exec nx build-deps user-ui

metadata.description: Runs Playwright Tests in src/example.spec.ts in CI
Merges Playwright blob reports from atomized tasks to produce unified reports for the configured reporters.

options.command: pnpm exec nx watch --projects admin-ui --includeDependentProjects -- pnpm exec nx build-deps admin-ui
